Class EfsPublishStatus<E extends IEfsEvent>

java.lang.Object
org.efs.bus.EfsPublishStatus<E>
Type Parameters:
E - published event class.
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEfsEvent
public final class EfsPublishStatus<E extends IEfsEvent> extends Object implements IEfsEvent
Reports a given topic's publish status. This includes number of publishers and if any of those publishers are currently publishing on the given topic. Value returned by activePublishers() defines the topic publish status:
  • Zero: there are no publishers actively post events on this topic and subscribers will not be receiving events.
  • > Zero: number of publishers actively posting events on this topic and subscribers will receive any events posted in the future.
  • == advertisedPublishers(): all publishers are actively posting events on this topic.
activePublishers() is the critical value and defines whether subscribers may expect to receive events on topic. advertisedPublishers() is provided an an ancillary value which may be used to trouble shoot why no events are being published to topic. That is, there is one publisher expected for this topic and that publisher is not advertised. Now the issue is: why is the publisher not even advertised?
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    INVALID_ACTIVE_COUNT
    An active publisher count < zero results in an IllegalArgumentException with message "active publisher count < 0".
    static final String
    INVALID_ADVERTISED_COUNT
    An advertised publisher count < zero results in an IllegalArgumentException with message "advertised publisher count < 0".

  • Field Details

    • INVALID_ADVERTISED_COUNT

      public static final String INVALID_ADVERTISED_COUNT
      An advertised publisher count < zero results in an IllegalArgumentException with message "advertised publisher count < 0".
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_ACTIVE_COUNT

      public static final String INVALID_ACTIVE_COUNT
      An active publisher count < zero results in an IllegalArgumentException with message "active publisher count < 0".
      See Also:

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)

      equals in class Object

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • topicKey

      @Nonnull public EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey()
      Returns topic key to which this publish status event applies.
      Returns:
      publish status applies to this topic key.

    • advertisedPublishers

      public int advertisedPublishers()
      Returns number of publishers currently advertised on topic key. This value will be ≥ zero and ≥ activePublishers(). If value is zero, then subscribers will not receive events for given topic.
      Returns:
      advertised publisher count.
      See Also:
      • activePublishers()

    • activePublishers

      public int activePublishers()
      Returns number of publishers actively publishing events on topic key. This value will be ≥ zero and ≤ advertisedPublishers(). If value is zero, then subscribers will not receive events for given topic.
      Returns:
      active publisher count.
      See Also:
      • advertisedPublishers()

    • builder

      public static <E extends IEfsEvent> EfsPublishStatus.Builder<E> builder()
      Returns a new EfsPublishStatus builder instance. It is recommended that a new builder be used for each new EfsPublishStatus event rather than re-using a builder to create multiple events.
      Type Parameters:
      E - publish status event applies to this event.
      Returns:
      a new EfsPublishStatus event builder.
